2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

888 TLPL - Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership

TLPL612 Teaching and Learning Algebra in the Middle School (3 Credits) Designed to enhance middle school mathematics teachers’ content and pedagogical knowledge in algebra.

Prerequisite: Admission to M.A. or M.Ed. with concentration in Mathematics Education; or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
